nasb.text: to the only God our Savior, through Jesus Christ our Lord, be glory, majesty, dominion and authority, before all time and now and forever. Amen.

esv.text: to the only God, our Savior, through Jesus Christ our Lord, be glory, majesty, dominion, and authority, before all time and now and forever. Amen.

ccb.text: 愿荣耀、威严、能力和权柄借着我们的主耶稣基督都归给祂，从万世以前直到现今，一直到永永远远。阿们！

csbs.text: 愿荣耀、尊严、大能、权柄，藉着我们的主耶稣基督归于独一的神我们的救主，从万古以前到现在，直到永永远远！阿们。
